title: Rankett Admin — Antenna domain connector
html:
Rankett internal admin (yahir@rankett.com) showing the Antenna module — Connected / Active / Injections / Pages tabs with "Connect Domain" empty state — the per-domain content-injection layer that ships schema / llms.txt / blog content to client sites. Sidebar tabs: Progress, Prospects, Antenna, YouTube, AI Profiles, Blog, Content Hub, Optimizations.

rankett · autonomous fulfillment engine · schema markup for ai · llm txt · ai visibility engine
